description: Greenhouse provides recruiting and onboarding software used to manage hiring workflows, job postings, candidates, assessments, and employee onboarding data. Its products include Greenhouse Recruiting, job board publishing, audit logging, and onboarding.
summary: Greenhouse exposes multiple developer surfaces: Harvest API v3, Job Board API, Candidate Ingestion API, Audit Log API, an Onboarding GraphQL API, and an Assessment partner API; authentication varies by API and includes OAuth, Basic auth, and required On-Behalf-Of headers for some flows.
